data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁17
data.summary: [4/18(Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-ga
data.body:
[4/18(Tue) Ban Notice]
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 7
▶ Period: Permanent
More details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/103931

#BlueArchive
